summary: Phase 3 comprehensive testing completed. Backend APIs 100% passing (26/26 tests). Admin Dashboard with 9 sidebar tabs fully functional. Driver registration page working. Vendor add product page with ImageUpload component working. File upload endpoint working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: City selector not auto-selecting when form is filled programmatically - requires manual selection

Admin Dashboard UI - all 9 sidebar tabs present and clickable
Admin Dashboard - Vendeurs tab with table

Admin Dashboard - Stats tab with metrics
Admin Dashboard - Paramètres vendeurs settings form
Admin Dashboard - Paramètres livreurs settings form

Vendor add product page form fields
critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in AdminDashboard.js and DriverDashboard.js for missing useEffect dependencies - minor, not affecting functionality
seed_data_creation: Multiple test drivers created during testing (prefixed with TEST_) - cleanup test included
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested and working: Admin Dashboard with 9 tabs (Vendeurs, Livreurs, Produits, Stats, Transactions, Trajet livreurs, Paramètres vendeurs, Paramètres livreurs, Paramètre général), Driver registration at /devenir-livreur, Driver dashboard at /livreur, Vendor add product with ImageUpload component, File upload endpoints POST /api/upload and POST /api/upload/multiple. All backend APIs passing. Driver section shows empty state as expected since no drivers are verified yet.
